parameters.cypherQuery:
=MATCH (pa:PhysicalApplication)
OPTIONAL MATCH (pa)-[:IMPLEMENTS]->(la1:LogicalApplication)
OPTIONAL MATCH (la1)-[:CHILD_OF]->(la2:LogicalApplication)
OPTIONAL MATCH (la2)-[:CHILD_OF]->(la3:LogicalApplication)
OPTIONAL MATCH (la3)-[:CHILD_OF]->(la4:LogicalApplication)
OPTIONAL MATCH (la4)-[:CHILD_OF]->(la5:LogicalApplication)
RETURN 
  pa.name AS PhysicalApplication,
  pa.displayId AS PhysicalAppID,
  la1.name AS LogicalLevel1,
  la1.displayId AS LogicalID1,
  la2.name AS LogicalLevel2,
  la2.displayId AS LogicalID2,
  la3.name AS LogicalLevel3,
  la3.displayId AS LogicalID3,
  la4.name AS LogicalLevel4,
  la4.displayId AS LogicalID4,
  la5.name AS LogicalLevel5,
  la5.displayId AS LogicalID5
ORDER BY 
  COALESCE(la5.name, ''), 
  COALESCE(la4.name, ''), 
  COALESCE(la3.name, ''), 
  COALESCE(la2.name, ''), 
  COALESCE(la1.name, ''), 
  pa.name
